options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: boss_goal
options.description: Select Dungeon from 2-6 to be the goal.

options.name: all_bosses
options.description: Requires defeating every boss up to the goal boss in order to finish the game.

options.name: memory_count
options.description: How many complete pieces of Seda's memory are required for access to the Dark Genie. No effect if boss goal is less than 6.

options.name: open_dungeon
options.description: Open all dungeon floors as they become logically available.

options.name: progressive_chars
options.description:
Makes all character recruitment buildings one progressive item.  Useful for long/large multiworlds.
All Player House pieces will be received, followed by Cacao's House starting at item 8, etc.

options.name: extra_char_buildings
options.description:
Adds an extra of each character recruitment building to the item pool as well as an extra Matataki River
in place of a number of Well parts. What building parts are reflected by the progressive_chars option.
Adds a little extra progression speed to larger multiworlds.

options.name: starter_weapons
options.description: Give each character a Tier 1 weapon in addition to their unbreakable starter.

options.name: miracle_sanity
options.description: Add miracle chests to the item pool.

options.name: abs_multiplier
options.description: Adjust the ABS gained from enemies.

options.name: attach_multiplier
options.description: Adjust the value of attachments. Does not affect attack/speed/magic/endurance received normally in game.

options.name: attach_mult_config
options.description: Enable attachment multiplier for all attachments, only those from MW, or no attachments.

options.name: auto_build
options.description:
Automatically places building pieces as received.
Hundo places buildings for 100% town completion.
Any percent places only buildings with chests clustered similar to how speed runs place them.
Muska only auto builds only Muska Lacka for 100%, robot only the sun giant and muska/robot builds both.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: toan_name
options.description:
Default name for Toan.
1-10 characters.  Valid Characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, '="!?#&+-*/%~()@|<>[]{}:,.$, space
Anything outside that range will fail generation.

NOTE: Must connect before hitting Start Game for Toan's name to be affected.

options.name: xiao_name
options.description:
Default name for Xiao.
1-10 characters.  Valid Characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, '="!?#&+-*/%~()@|<>[]{}:,.$, space
Cannot start with a space. Anything outside that range will fail generation.

options.name: goro_name
options.description:

1-10 characters.  Valid Characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, '="!?#&+-*/%~()@|<>[]{}:,.$, space
Cannot start with a space. Anything outside that range will fail generation.

1-10 characters.  Valid Characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, '="!?#&+-*/%~()@|<>[]{}:,.$, space

options.name: osmond_name
options.description:

1-10 characters.  Valid Characters: A-Z, a-z, 0-9, '="!?#&+-*/%~()@|<>[]{}:,.$, space
Cannot start with a space. Anything outside that range will fail generation.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.
